records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Veronica! You came right in time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ach, Veronica! Sie sind genau zur rechten Zeit gekommen!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for calling the Flora Maid Service, Master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Danke, dass Sie den Hausm95tdchenservice Flora nutzen, Sir.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Merci d'avoir fait appel au Service domestique Flora, Ma95|tre.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Jaegar said you wanted me, so I came with a glad heart.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Mme Jaeger m'a dit que vous aviez besoin de mon aide, ce qui me r959jouit.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hmpf... Why didn
8kt he tell us earlier? If I knew the Chief Maid was coming, I wouldn't have exerted myself.

Are you okay, ma
8kams? I was very worried about you when the mean lady came here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you are the one they were waiting for?

8kt look like a Counter. Don
